since_last: 32% of 84 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +2.03%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 32% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.52% · BTC +0.02% · Gold +0.02% · Nasdaq100 -1.89%. 32% of 84 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +2.03%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +2.03%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -5.41%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: TER is the standout at -11.24%
cards.body: Leaders: NET +6.36%, ADBE +5.21%, WDAY +4.51%, NOW +4.21%, INTU +4.01%. Laggards: TER -11.24%, INTC -10.46%, AMBA -9.49%, MRVL -8.81%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -5.50% at $151.59
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -5.50% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
